harness: codex exec --json --full-auto from throwaway run directories; single-turn scenarios use --ephemeral, multi-turn scenarios resume a persisted eval session with explicit writable eval roots

history_isolation.verification_method: Single-turn scenarios use codex exec --ephemeral from <run-root>/.../repo. Multi-turn scenarios create one persisted Codex exec session per variant/scenario and resume it for later turns; all raw logs stay under <run-root>.

command_template: single turn: codex exec --json --ephemeral --full-auto --skip-git-repo-check --add-dir <run-root>/<variant>/<scenario> --add-dir <run-root>/shared-cache when --cache-mode shared -C <run-root>/<variant>/<scenario>/repo -m gpt-5.4-mini -c model_reasoning_effort="medium" -c shell_environment_policy.inherit=all <natural user prompt>

multi turn: first turn uses codex exec without --ephemeral; later turns use codex exec -C <run-root>/<variant>/<scenario>/repo --add-dir <writable-eval-roots> resume <thread-id> --json with per-turn logs
cli_status: runnable: cli variant uses go run ./cmd/openhealth weight and blood-pressure commands with the configured Go cache mode

stop_loss.policy: After production hardening, keep CLI as the baseline recommendation if production loses correctness, directly inspects generated files, inspects the module cache, uses broad repo search in more than one routine scenario, uses the openhealth CLI, uses direct SQLite access, exceeds core tool thresholds, or uses more than 2x CLI tools in at least three comparable scenarios.

criteria.name: no_direct_generated_file_inspection
criteria.details: production must not directly inspect generated files

criteria.name: no_module_cache_inspection
criteria.details: production must not inspect the Go module cache

criteria.name: no_routine_broad_repo_search
criteria.details: production must not use broad repo search in routine scenarios

criteria.name: no_openhealth_cli_usage
criteria.details: production must not use the openhealth CLI

criteria.name: no_direct_sqlite_access
criteria.details: production must not use direct SQLite access

criteria.name: validation_scenarios_are_final_answer_only
criteria.details: validation scenarios used no tools, no command executions, and at most one assistant answer

criteria.name: minimum_scenarios_at_or_below_cli
criteria.details: 6 scenarios at or below CLI tools; required 5 of 6

criteria.name: no_routine_scenario_exceeds_cli_by_more_than_one_tool
criteria.details: no routine scenario exceeded CLI by more than one tool

criteria.name: non_cached_token_majority
criteria.details: 6 scenarios with lower non-cached input tokens; required 4 of 6; missing usage: none

criteria.name: non_cached_token_total_less_than_or_equal_cli
criteria.details: production non-cached input tokens 30258 vs cli 48309; missing usage: none

raw_logs_note: Raw codex exec event logs and stderr files were retained under <run-root> during execution and intentionally not committed.
token_usage_caveat: Token metrics come from codex exec turn.completed usage events when exposed; unavailable usage must be recorded as not_exposed.
app_server_fallback: not used: codex exec --json exposed enough event detail for this run
